prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Shadowrun / Sixth World inspired cyberpunk urban-fantasy atlas for the terrain type single_continent.
Scene/backdrop: one huge primary continent dominated by sprawling metropolitan districts, megacorp arcology towers, barrens slums, matrix access node hubs, gang territory borders, smuggling docks, awakened wilderness preserves, dragon-owned corporate enclaves, toxic industrial zones, neon port cities and magical leyline anomalies.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated cyberpunk world atlas, dark map with neon highlights, rain-slicked dystopian atmosphere, corporate logo glow, holo-billboard light, Matrix overlay hexagons, urban fantasy cartography.
Composition/framing: tall portrait atlas view, single continent fills most of the vertical frame with surrounding black ocean and offshore sprawl islands; include digital compass, circuit-like border, transit routes, gang-zone markings, corporate district icons and Matrix node overlays without readable text.
Geography constraints: large world map crossing many climates and biomes; complex realistic coastline with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, deltas, polluted estuaries, seawalls and varied landforms; include megacity sprawl, rain forests, deserts, mountain arcologies, toxic wetlands, coastal docks, awakened forests and wasteland barrens.
Avoid: clean utopian sci-fi, medieval fantasy map, simple oval continent, modern satellite image, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
